creator: helen.koike@collabora.com
text:
Created attachment 191977
Patch to add missing dependency to sysutils/py-google-compute-engine

Please see attached patch that adds a missing dependency (sysutils/google-compute-engine-oslogin) for sysutils/py-google-compute-engine as required by the upstream project https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/compute-image-packages/blob/master/debian/control#L22
